1→# Getting Started with Create React App
     2→
     3→This project was bootstrapped with [Create React App](https://github.com/facebook/create-react-app).
     4→
     5→## Available Scripts
     6→
     7→In the project directory, you can run:
     8→
     9→### `npm start`
    10→
    11→Runs the app in the development mode.\
    12→Open [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000) to view it in your browser.
    13→
    14→The page will reload when you make changes.\
    15→You may also see any lint errors in the console.
    16→
    17→### `npm test`
    18→
    19→Launches the test runner in the interactive watch mode.\
    20→See the section about [running tests](https://facebook.github.io/create-react-app/docs/running-tests) for more information.
    21→
    22→### `npm run build`
    23→
    24→Builds the app for production to the `build` folder.\
    25→It correctly bundles React in production mode and optimizes the build for the best performance.
    26→
    27→The build is minified and the filenames include the hashes.\
    28→Your app is ready to be deployed!
    29→
    30→See the section about [deployment](https://facebook.github.io/create-react-app/docs/deployment) for more information.
    31→
    32→### `npm run eject`
    33→
    34→**Note: this is a one-way operation. Once you `eject`, you can't go back!**
    35→
    36→If you aren't satisfied with the build tool and configuration choices, you can `eject` at any time. This command will remove the single build dependency from your project.
    37→
    38→Instead, it will copy all the configuration files and the transitive dependencies (webpack, Babel, ESLint, etc) right into your project so you have full control over them. All of the commands except `eject` will still work, but they will point to the copied scripts so you can tweak them. At this point you're on your own.
    39→
    40→You don't have to ever use `eject`. The curated feature set is suitable for small and middle deployments, and you shouldn't feel obligated to use this feature. However we understand that this tool wouldn't be useful if you couldn't customize it when you are ready for it.
    41→
    42→## Learn More
    43→
    44→You can learn more in the [Create React App documentation](https://facebook.github.io/create-react-app/docs/getting-started).
    45→
    46→To learn React, check out the [React documentation](https://reactjs.org/).

     2→  "name": "gormaran-ai-growth-hub",
     3→  "version": "0.1.0",
     4→  "private": true,
     5→  "dependencies": {
     6→    "@stripe/react-stripe-js": "^5.6.0",

    29→    "start": "react-scripts start",

    32→    "build": "react-scripts build",
    33→    "postbuild": "react-snap || true",

    37→  "reactSnap": {
    38→    "source": "build",

    41→      "/",

    44→      "/privacy-policy",
    45→      "/terms-of-service",
    46→      "/cookie-policy"
    47→    ],
    48→    "puppeteerArgs": ["--no-sandbox", "--disable-setuid-sandbox"],
    49→    "minifyHtml": {
    50→      "collapseWhitespace": false,
    51→      "removeComments": false
    52→    }
    53→  },
    54→  "eslintConfig": {
    55→    "extends": [
    56→      "react-app",
    57→      "react-app/jest"
    58→    ]
    59→  },
    60→  "browserslist": {
    61→    "production": [
    62→      ">0.2%",
    63→      "not dead",
    64→      "not op_mini all"
    65→    ],
    66→    "development": [
    67→      "last 1 chrome version",
    68→      "last 1 firefox version",
    69→      "last 1 safari version"
    70→    ]
    71→  },
    72→  "devDependencies": {
    73→    "react-snap": "^1.23.0"
    74→  }
    75→}
    76→

1→# ============================================================
     2→# GORMARAN AI GROWTH HUB - Frontend Environment Variables
     3→# Copy this file to .env and fill in your values
     4→# ============================================================
     5→
     6→# Firebase Configuration (from Firebase Console > Project Settings)
     7→REACT_APP_FIREBASE_API_KEY=your_firebase_api_key
     8→REACT_APP_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=your_project_id.firebaseapp.com
     9→REACT_APP_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=your_project_id
    10→REACT_APP_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=your_project_id.appspot.com
    11→REACT_APP_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=your_messaging_sender_id
    12→REACT_APP_FIREBASE_APP_ID=your_firebase_app_id
    13→
    14→# Stripe (Publishable Key - safe for frontend)
    15→REACT_APP_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=pk_live_your_stripe_publishable_key
    16→
    17→# Stripe Price IDs (from Stripe Dashboard > Products)
    18→REACT_APP_STRIPE_GROW_PRICE_ID=price_your_pro_monthly_price_id
    19→REACT_APP_STRIPE_SCALE_PRICE_ID=price_your_business_monthly_price_id
    20→REACT_APP_STRIPE_EVOLUTION_PRICE_ID=price_your_evolution_monthly_price_id
    21→REACT_APP_STRIPE_N8N_ADDON_PRICE_ID=price_your_n8n_addon_price_id
    22→
    23→# Backend API URL
    24→REACT_APP_API_URL=http://localhost:5000
    25→

1→export const CATEGORIES = [
     2→  {
     3→    id: 'marketing',
     4→    name: 'Marketing & Growth',
     5→    description: 'SEO, copywriting, social media, ads, and email campaigns',
     6→    icon: '📈',
     7→    gradient: 'from-violet-600 to-purple-600',
     8→    color: '#7c3aed',
     9→    tools: [
    10→      {
    11→        id: 'seo-keyword-research',
    12→        name: 'Keyword Research',
    13→        description: 'Discover high-traffic, low-competition keywords to rank on Google and drive targeted organic traffic',
    14→        icon: '🔍',
    15→        inputs: [
    16→          { id: 'keyword', label: 'Target Keyword / Topic', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., email marketing automation', required: true },
    17→          { id: 'industry', label: 'Industry / Niche', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., SaaS, E-commerce, Healthcare', required: true },
    18→          { id: 'content_type', label: 'Content Type', type: 'select', options: ['Blog Post', 'Landing Page', 'Product Page', 'Category Page', 'Home Page'], required: true },
    19→          { id: 'audience', label: 'Target Audience', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., small business owners, marketing managers' },
    20→          { id: 'competitor', label: 'Main Competitor URL (optional)', type: 'text', placeholder: 'https://competitor.com' },
    21→        ],
    22→        systemPrompt: `You are a world-class SEO strategist with 15+ years of experience in keyword research, search intent analysis, and content strategy. You have helped hundreds of businesses rank on page 1 of Google.
    23→
    24→When given a target keyword and business context, provide a comprehensive, highly actionable keyword research report formatted with clear markdown sections:
    25→
    26→1. **Primary Keyword Analysis** — Search intent classification (informational/navigational/commercial/transactional), estimated monthly search volume range, keyword difficulty estimate (1-100), and opportunity score with reasoning.
    27→2. **12 LSI & Semantic Keywords** — Table with keyword, estimated volume, intent, and recommended use (header/body/meta).
    28→3. **8 High-Value Long-Tail Variations** — Specific low-competition variations that are easier to rank for but have buying intent.
    29→4. **5 Question-Based Keywords** — Perfect for featured snippets and People Also Ask. Include the exact question format.
    30→5. **Content Blueprint** — Recommended H1, meta description, content outline (with H2/H3 structure), and word count target.
    31→6. **Quick Win Opportunities** — 3 specific keywords with difficulty under 30 that can generate traffic within 90 days.
    32→7. **Competitor Keyword Gap** — If competitor URL provided, 5 keywords they likely rank for that you should target.
    33→
    34→Format everything in scannable markdown with tables where appropriate. Be specific, data-driven, and actionable.`,
    35→        buildUserMessage: (inputs) =>
    36→          `Please conduct a comprehensive keyword research analysis:\n\n**Target Keyword:** ${inputs.keyword}\n**Industry/Niche:** ${inputs.industry}\n**Content Type:** ${inputs.content_type}\n**Target Audience:** ${inputs.audience || 'General audience'}\n**Competitor URL:** ${inputs.competitor || 'Not provided'}\n\nProvide the full keyword research report with all sections.`,
    37→      },
    38→      {
    39→        id: 'seo-meta-tags',
    40→        name: 'Meta Tags Generator',
    41→        description: 'Create SEO-optimized title tags and meta descriptions that maximize click-through rates from search results',
    42→        icon: '🏷️',
    43→        inputs: [
    44→          { id: 'page_topic', label: 'Page Topic / Product', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., Project management software for remote teams', required: true },
    45→          { id: 'primary_keyword', label: 'Primary Keyword', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., project management software', required: true },
    46→          { id: 'brand_name', label: 'Brand Name', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., Acme Corp', required: true },
    47→          { id: 'usp', label: 'Unique Selling Point', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., AI-powered, #1 rated, free trial' },
    48→          { id: 'page_type', label: 'Page Type', type: 'select', options: ['Home Page', 'Product Page', 'Blog Post', 'Category Page', 'Landing Page', 'About Page'] },
    49→        ],
    50→        systemPrompt: `You are an expert SEO copywriter specializing in click-through rate optimization. You understand exactly how Google displays meta tags and how to write copy that maximizes clicks from search results.
    51→
    52→For each request, provide:
    53→1. **5 Title Tag Variations** — Exactly formatted with character count. Must be 50-60 characters. Include primary keyword, brand, and a compelling element (number, benefit, power word).
    54→2. **5 Meta Description Variations** — Exactly 150-160 characters each. Include primary keyword, clear benefit, and a CTA. Show character count for each.
    55→3. **Schema Markup Recommendation** — Suggest the most appropriate schema type (Article, Product, FAQ, etc.) with a brief explanation.
    56→4. **Open Graph Title & Description** — Optimized for social sharing, can be slightly different from SEO meta tags.
    57→5. **Performance Score** — Rate your best suggestion on: keyword inclusion, emotional appeal, clarity, and CTA strength (each out of 10).
    58→
    59→Always show exact character counts in brackets after each variation. Flag any that are too long/short.`,
    60→        buildUserMessage: (inputs) =>
    61→          `Generate optimized meta tags for:\n\n**Page Topic:** ${inputs.page_topic}\n**Primary Keyword:** ${inputs.primary_keyword}\n**Brand Name:** ${inputs.brand_name}\n**Unique Selling Point:** ${inputs.usp || 'Not specified'}\n**Page Type:** ${inputs.page_type || 'Landing Page'}\n\nProvide all 5 variations for both title tags and meta descriptions with character counts.`,
    62→      },
    63→      {
    64→        id: 'copywriting-headlines',
    65→        name: 'Headline Generator',
    66→        description: 'Generate high-converting headlines using proven copywriting formulas and psychological triggers',
    67→        icon: '✍️',
    68→        inputs: [
    69→          { id: 'product', label: 'Product / Service / Content', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., CRM software for sales teams', required: true },
    70→          { id: 'benefit', label: 'Primary Benefit / Outcome', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., close 40% more deals', required: true },
    71→          { id: 'audience', label: 'Target Audience', type: 'text', placeholder: 'e.g., B2B sales managers', required: true },
    72→          { id: 'medium', label: 'Where will this be used?', type: 'select', options: ['Homepage', 'Landing Page', 'Email Subject', 'Blog Post', 'Google Ad', 'Facebook Ad', 'Sales Page', 'YouTube Title'] },
    73→          { id: 'tone', label: 'Tone', type: 'select', options: ['Professional', 'Urgent', 'Conversational', 'Bold', 'Empathetic', 'Data-driven'] },
    74→        ],
    75→        systemPrompt: `You are a master copywriter with expertise in direct response marketing, having written headlines that generated millions in revenue. You deeply understand psychological triggers: curiosity gaps, specificity, social proof, urgency, and transformation.
    76→
    77→Generate a comprehensive headline toolkit:
    78→
    79→1. **Formula-Based Headlines (8 variations)** — Use proven formulas:
    80→   - "How to [achieve outcome] without [pain point]"
    81→   - "[Number] Ways to [achieve benefit] in [timeframe]"
    82→   - "The [adjective] Way to [desired result]"
    83→   - "Stop [negative behavior]. Start [positive result]."
    84→   - "Why [target audience] are [achieving result] with [product]"
    85→   - "[Achieve goal] Even If [common objection]"
    86→   - "The Secret [experts] Use to [amazing result]"
    87→   - "[Shocking/bold statement about the problem]"
    88→
    89→2. **Power Word Headlines (5 variations)** — Incorporate power words: Proven, Secret, Exclusive, Instant, Revolutionary, Guaranteed
    90→
    91→3. **Question-Based Headlines (3 variations)** — Thought-provoking questions that make the reader self-identify
    92→
    93→4. **Data-Driven Headlines (3 variations)** — Include specific numbers, percentages, or timeframes
    94→
    95→5. **Top 3 Recommendations** — Your best picks with a brief explanation of why each works psychologically
    96→
    97→Rate each headline on Specificity, Emotional Impact, and Relevance (1-10 each).`,
    98→        buildUserMessage: (inputs) =>
    99→          `Create high-converting headlines for:\n\n**Product/Service:** ${inputs.product}\n**Primary Benefit:** ${inputs.benefit}\n**Target Audience:** ${inputs.audience}\n**Medium:** ${inputs.medium || 'Landing Page'}\n**Tone:** ${inputs.tone || 'Professional'}\n\nProvide the full headline toolkit with all categories and ratings.`,
   100→      },

1→# ============================================================
     2→# GORMARAN AI GROWTH HUB - Backend Environment Variables
     3→# Copy this file to server/.env and fill in your values
     4→# ============================================================
     5→
     6→PORT=5000
     7→
     8→# Anthropic Claude API Key (from console.anthropic.com)
     9→ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-your_anthropic_api_key
    10→
    11→# Stripe Secret Key (from Stripe Dashboard > Developers > API Keys)
    12→STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_live_your_stripe_secret_key
    13→STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET=whsec_your_stripe_webhook_secret
    14→
    15→# Stripe Price IDs (from Stripe Dashboard > Products)
    16→STRIPE_GROW_PRICE_ID=price_your_grow_monthly_price_id
    17→STRIPE_SCALE_PRICE_ID=price_your_scale_monthly_price_id
    18→STRIPE_EVOLUTION_PRICE_ID=price_your_evolution_monthly_price_id
    19→# Admin UIDs (comma-separated Firebase UIDs that always get full access)
    20→ADMIN_UIDS=your_firebase_uid
    21→
    22→# Firebase Admin SDK (from Firebase Console > Project Settings > Service Accounts)
    23→FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=your_project_id
    24→FIREBASE_PRIVATE_KEY="-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----\nyour_private_key\n-----END PRIVATE KEY-----\n"
    25→FIREBASE_CLIENT_EMAIL=firebase-adminsdk-xxxxx@your_project_id.iam.gserviceaccount.com
    26→
    27→# Frontend URL (for CORS and Stripe redirect)
    28→FRONTEND_URL=http://localhost:3000
    29→
    30→# ── OAuth: Google Analytics ──────────────────────────────────────
    31→# From Google Cloud Console > APIs & Services > Credentials
    32→GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID=your_google_client_id.apps.googleusercontent.com
    33→GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET=your_google_client_secret
    34→GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI=https://gormaran-growth-hub.onrender.com/api/oauth/google_analytics/callback

content.text:
Perfect! Now let me create a comprehensive summary of my findings:

## COMPREHENSIVE PROJECT OVERVIEW: Gormaran AI Growth Hub

### 1. PROJECT STRUCTURE & DIRECTORIES

```
/Users/gabiorma/VS Code/SaaS-gormaran-ai-growth-hub/
├── src/                          # Frontend React application
│   ├── pages/                    # Page components (Landing, Dashboard, Pricing, etc.)
│   ├── components/               # Reusable components (Navbar, Footer, AIToolInterface, etc.)
│   ├── context/                  # React Context (AuthContext, SubscriptionContext)
│   ├── utils/                    # Utility functions (API client, analytics)
│   ├── firebase/                 # Firebase configuration
│   ├── i18n/                     # Internationalization setup
│   ├── data/                     # Static data (categories.js with tool definitions)
│   ├── App.js                    # Main app router
│   └── index.js                  # React entry point
├── server/                       # Backend Node.js/Express application
│   ├── routes/                   # API route handlers
│   │   ├── ai.js                 # AI generation endpoint
│   │   ├── stripe.js             # Payment/checkout endpoints
│   │   ├── imageGeneration.js    # Image generation endpoint
│   │   ├── oauth.js              # OAuth (Google, Instagram, LinkedIn)
│   │   ├── categoryPrompts.js    # Tool prompts & configurations
│   │   └── instagramWebhook.js   # Instagram webhook handler
│   ├── middleware/               # Authentication middleware
│   ├── index.js                  # Express server entry point
│   └── package.json              # Backend dependencies
├── public/                       # Static assets (favicon, logos, manifest)
├── build/                        # Production build output (React)
├── package.json                  # Frontend dependencies
└── README.md                     # Project documentation
```

---

### 2. PROJECT DESCRIPTION & PURPOSE

**Gormaran AI Growth Hub** is a comprehensive SaaS platform that provides AI-powered business tools organized by industry category. It's designed to help marketers, freelancers, entrepreneurs, and agency owners automate and accelerate their business processes using structured AI workflows.

**Core Value Proposition:**
- **35+ specialized AI tools** across 10 business categories
- **Execution frameworks** vs. generic AI (unlike ChatGPT)
- **Structured, ready-to-use outputs** instead of raw text
- **Tiered pricing** with free trial and three paid plans (Grow, Scale, Evolution)
- **Add-on system** for n8n workflow automation

---

### 3. TECHNOLOGY STACK

#### **Frontend (React)**
- **React 19.1.0** - UI framework
- **React Router DOM 7.13.0** - Client-side routing
- **Framer Motion 12.34.3** - Smooth animations and transitions
- **Firebase 12.9.0** - Authentication and Firestore database
- **Stripe React 5.6.0** - Payment integration
- **i18next 23.8.0 & react-i18next 13.5.0** - Internationalization (multi-language support)
- **Axios 1.13.5** - HTTP client
- **React GA4 2.1.0** - Google Analytics integration
- **React Markdown 10.1.0** - Markdown rendering
- **Remark GFM 4.0.1** - GitHub-flavored markdown support

#### **Backend (Node.js/Express)**
- **Express 5.2.1** - REST API framework
- **Firebase Admin SDK 13.6.1** - Backend Firebase integration
- **Anthropic SDK 0.78.0** - Claude AI API integration
- **OpenAI SDK 6.25.0** - Alternative AI provider
- **Stripe 20.3.1** - Payment processing
- **Express Rate Limit 8.2.1** - API rate limiting
- **Helmet 8.1.0** - Security headers (commented out)
- **CORS 2.8.6** - Cross-origin request handling
- **Dotenv 17.3.1** - Environment variable management

#### **Infrastructure & Services**
- **Firebase Authentication** - User sign-up/login (Email + Google OAuth)
- **Firebase Firestore** - User data, subscription tracking
- **Firebase Storage** (optional) - File storage
- **Stripe** - Subscription billing and payments
- **Anthropic Claude** - Primary AI model for content generation
- **OpenAI** - Alternative AI provider
- **Google Analytics** - User behavior tracking
- **OAuth 2.0** - Multi-platform integrations (Google, Instagram/Meta, LinkedIn)

#### **Build & Deployment**
- **Create React App** - Build tool & development server
- **Render** - Deployment platform (frontend + backend)
- **react-snap** - Static pre-rendering for SEO

---

### 4. KEY FEATURES ALREADY IMPLEMENTED

#### **A. User Authentication & Management**
- Email/password registration and login
- Google OAuth sign-in
- Firebase authentication with Firestore user profiles
- User display names and profile management
- Password reset functionality
- Protected routes (ProtectedRoute component)

#### **B. Subscription & Billing System**
- **4 subscription tiers:**
  - **Free** - Limited access (2 tools) with 14-day full trial
  - **Grow (€19/mo)** - Marketing, content, digital categories
  - **Scale (€49/mo)** - Grow + e-commerce, agency, creative
  - **Evolution (€99/mo)** - All categories + strategy, startup, finance
  - **Automation Add-on (€10)** - n8n workflow integration
- Stripe Checkout integration (card payments)
- Stripe Customer Portal (subscription management)
- Promotional code/discount code system
- Trial day tracking and display
- Usage tracking/counting

#### **C. AI Tool System (35+ Tools)**
Organized into 10 categories:
1. **Marketing & Growth (6 tools)** - SEO, keyword research, copywriting, social media
2. **Content (4 tools)** - Blog writer, newsletter, video scripts, logos
3. **Digital & Ads (3 tools)** - Google Ads, Meta Ads, landing pages
4. **Strategy (4 tools)** - Business plan, market analysis, competitor research, SWOT
5. **E-commerce (3 tools)** - Amazon listings, product descriptions, CRO audits
6. **Agency (3 tools)** - Proposals, reports, case studies
7. **Creative (3 tools)** - Brand identity, photo direction, video production
8. **Startup (3 tools)** - Investor pitch, GTM strategy, user stories
9. **Finance (3 tools)** - Financial forecasts, investment analysis, cash flow
10. **Automation (1 tool)** - n8n workflow builder

#### **D. AI Generation Interface**
- **AIToolInterface component** - Main tool execution interface
- Category-based tool selection with sidebar navigation
- Dynamic form fields based on tool requirements
- Streaming AI responses (Server-Sent Events)
- Real-time output display with markdown formatting
- Copy-to-clipboard functionality
- Usage history tracking
- Tool execution with plan-based access control

#### **E. Instagram Audit Feature**
- Free tool for analyzing Instagram profiles
- Generates audit score (1-100)
- 3 priority growth recommendations
- Accessible from dashboard without signup

### 6. BACKEND API ROUTES & STRUCTURE

#### **Main Server** (`/server/index.js`)
- Express app with CORS configuration
- Supports localhost:3000, Render deployments, and gormaran.io domain
- Trust proxy set to 1 (required for Render)
- Rate limiting middleware
- Raw body parsing for Stripe webhooks
- JSON body parsing (10MB limit)
- Error handling and 404 routes

#### **AI Route** (`/server/routes/ai.js`)
- **POST /api/ai/generate** - Main content generation endpoint
  - Rate limited: 60 requests per 15 minutes per IP
  - Requires Firebase authentication token
  - Plan-based access control (checks subscription tier)
  - Trial handling (14-day full access for free users)
  - Streaming SSE response with Claude AI
  - Supports admin UIDs for testing
  - Firestore integration for subscription verification

#### **Stripe Routes** (`/server/routes/stripe.js`)
- **POST /api/stripe/create-checkout** - Start payment flow
  - Creates Stripe Checkout Session
  - Supports both one-time and subscription modes
  - Promo code/discount integration
  - Returns session URL for redirect
- **POST /api/stripe/create-portal** - Customer portal access
  - Allows users to manage subscriptions
  - Falls back to Firestore stripeCustomerId lookup
- **POST /api/stripe/validate-promo** - Validate discount codes
  - Checks if promo code is valid and active
  - Returns discount amount/percentage

#### **Other Routes**
- `/api/image/` - Image generation endpoint
- `/api/oauth/` - OAuth callbacks and integrations
- `/api/webhooks/instagram/` - Instagram webhook handler

#### **Middleware**
- **Firebase Auth** - `verifyToken` middleware for protected routes
  - Validates JWT tokens
  - Extracts user info for downstream use

#### **Database (Firestore)**
**Users collection:**
```javascript
{
  uid: string,
  email: string,
  displayName: string,
  photoURL: string,
  subscription: string (free|grow|scale|evolution|admin),
  usageCount: number,
  usageResetDate: date,
  stripeCustomerId: string (optional),
  createdAt: timestamp,
  updatedAt: timestamp
}
```

---

### 7. DEPLOYMENT & ENVIRONMENT CONFIGURATION

#### **Frontend Environment Variables** (`.env.example`)
```
REACT_APP_FIREBASE_* - Firebase config
REACT_APP_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY - Stripe public key
REACT_APP_STRIPE_*_PRICE_ID - Plan price IDs
REACT_APP_API_URL - Backend URL
REACT_APP_ADMIN_UIDS - Admin user UIDs
```

#### **Backend Environment Variables** (`.env.example`)
```
PORT - Server port (default 5000)
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY - Claude API key
STRIPE_SECRET_KEY - Stripe secret key
STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET - Webhook verification
FIREBASE_* - Firebase admin credentials
FRONTEND_URL - For CORS and redirects
GOOGLE_OAUTH_* - Google Analytics OAuth
META_APP_* - Instagram/Meta OAuth
LINKEDIN_* - LinkedIn OAuth
ADMIN_UIDS - Comma-separated admin UIDs
```

#### **Deployment Targets**
- **Frontend:** `https://gormaran-growth-hub-1.onrender.com`
- **Backend:** `https://gormaran-growth-hub.onrender.com`
- **Production Domain:** `https://gormaran.io` & `https://www.gormaran.io`

### 8. PLAN & ACCESS CONTROL SYSTEM

#### **Free Plan (€0)**
- **Duration:** 14-day trial with full access
- **Post-trial tools:** 3 tools (SEO keyword research, SEO meta tags, Instagram audit)
- **Usage:** Unlimited during trial
- **Support:** Email support

#### **Grow Plan (€19/month)**
- **Categories:** Marketing, Content, Digital
- **Additional tools:** Business plan tool from Strategy
- **Support:** Priority email support

#### **Scale Plan (€49/month)**
- **Categories:** All Grow categories + E-commerce, Agency, Creative
- **Additional tools:** Business plan from Strategy
- **Support:** Priority email support

#### **Evolution Plan (€129/month)**
- **All categories:** Marketing, Content, Digital, E-commerce, Agency, Creative, Strategy, Startup, Finance
- **Full access:** All 35+ tools
- **Support:** Dedicated account manager + onboarding

#### **Add-ons**
- **n8n Automation (€10 per 10 workflows)** - Works with any plan

**Access Control Implementation:**
- Checked on both frontend and backend
- Frontend hides locked categories
- Backend enforces actual access
- Trial bypass (14 days of full access)
- Admin UID override for testing

---

### 9. PAYMENT & MONETIZATION FLOW

1. **User Selection** - Choose plan on pricing page
2. **Authentication** - Redirect to login if not signed in
3. **Stripe Checkout** - Card payment with optional promo code
4. **Webhook Processing** - Stripe updates subscription status
5. **Firestore Update** - User subscription tier updated
6. **Dashboard Refresh** - User sees new plan benefits
7. **Tool Access** - Tools unlock based on new tier

**Supported Payment Methods:**
- Credit/debit cards via Stripe
- Multiple currencies (EUR implied)
- Recurring subscriptions
- One-time payments (add-ons)
- Promo code discounts
